title: helichrysum basalticum
intro: Helichrysum basalticum, also known as Rock Rose, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South Africa. The plant's medicinal properties are primarily attributed to its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum basalticum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum basalticum include essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
